title: Semiconductor concentration
question: How much of a chip index is one stock, and do this year's winners win again?
finding: On an 82-name from-scratch index, NVDA is 43% of the gain and 32% of weight; the top three are 79% and the seven names over $500B are 91% of all gain. Cap-weighted +489% vs equal +296% (a 193pt gap), more concentrated than the Nasdaq on 86% of days. Persistence is not testable annually (only 2 clean year-transitions) and flat at the monthly/quarterly horizon (IC +0.02-0.03, t<1.3). A risk fact, not a timing signal.
